name: resume-bridge
description: Privacy-conscious browser extension for filling job application forms from one local profile.

scripts.check: node --check src/background.js && node --check src/content.js && node --check src/options.js && node --check src/popup.js && node --check src/tracker.js && node --check src/job-tracker.js && node --check src/date-utils.js && node --check src/project-utils.js && node --check src/profile-utils.js && node --check src/safety-policy.js && node --check src/message-policy.js && node --check src/ai-privacy.js && node --check scripts/qa-extension-smoke.js
